name: carevance-desktop
description: CareVance Tracker desktop timer and activity tracker
author: CareVance

scripts.start: npm run prepare:app-config && npm run prepare:browser-extension && node scripts/run-electron.cjs .
scripts.pack: npm run prepare:app-config && npm run prepare:browser-extension && electron-builder --dir --config.directories.output=release-v%npm_package_version%
scripts.dist:win: npm run prepare:app-config && npm run prepare:browser-extension && electron-builder --win nsis --config.directories.output=release-v%npm_package_version%
scripts.dist:portable: npm run prepare:app-config && npm run prepare:browser-extension && electron-builder --win portable --config.directories.output=release-v%npm_package_version%
